query:
SELECT p.id AS productId, p.batchNo,
       COUNT(DISTINCT st.id) AS taskCount,
       GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(st.stationCode, ':', st.stationTaskStatus) ORDER BY st.id SEPARATOR ' | ') AS taskSummary,
       COUNT(DISTINCT se.id) AS eventCount,
       COUNT(DISTINCT psd.id) AS scoreCount
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN station_tasks st ON st.productId = p.id
LEFT JOIN station_events se ON se.productId = p.id
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.productId = p.id
WHERE p.id IN (540612,540679,540618,540675,540613,540693,540615,540689,540624,540664)
GROUP BY p.id, p.batchNo
ORDER BY p.batchNo ASC, p.id ASC;
